description_long: This object is a classic assault rifle with a wooden fixed stock, wooden handguard, and a curved detachable box magazine. The receiver and barrel are constructed from dark metal, giving it a robust and utilitarian appearance. The rifle features standard iron sights, with a front post and a rear notch, and a slanted muzzle device at the end of the barrel. The trigger, magazine release, and safety selector are all visible, indicating functional mechanical parts. The wood components have a reddish-brown finish, contrasting with the matte black metal. The overall design is iconic and instantly recognizable, often associated with military and paramilitary use in urban environments.
description: A classic assault rifle with a wooden stock and handguard, black metal receiver, and a curved magazine. Features iron sights and a slanted muzzle device.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the wooden stock, handguard, curved magazine, and iron sights.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the alignment of the barrel, receiver, and the narrow width of the rifle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the first, with clear visibility of the magazine and wooden components.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view focusing on the underside of the stock, magazine, and barrel, showing the trigger guard and magazine release.
